subcodes.first_line: That which was recorded concerning the maternal uncle - upon him be the Most Glorious Beauty of God - was submitted unto the Most Holy Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینکه در باب خال علیه بهآء الله الابهی مرقوم داشتند بساحت اقدس عرض شد و این
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
